programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Ann convinces Leslie to sign up for an online dating service, only to be matched with someone she already knows. Chris decides to start a health initiative and challenges Ron to a burger cook-off.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John talks about the aftermath of the Brexit vote in the United Kingdom and doping in sports with the 2016 Summer Olympics in Rio on the horizon.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains newfound, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: An Idiot Abroad
programme.desc: Reluctant globetrotter Karl Pilkington is reunited with Ricky Gervais and Stephen Merchant to reflect on his journeys to the seven wonders of the modern world, considering whether travel has truly broadened his mind.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates the production processes for Skeletal Replicas, Ice Buckets & Servers, Dining Chairs, and Inground Pools and shows how each is made.
programme.sub-title: Skeletal Replicas, Ice Buckets & Servers, Dining Chairs, Inground Pools
